headline: Bond traders eye packed week of rate decisions for sell signals
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The world’s most important central banks will potentially hand investors fresh reasons to sell government bonds this week as policymakers find themselves forced to confront the risk of a war-driven inflation shock.Most Read from BloombergThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandGunman Detained, Trump Evacuated After Shooting at Press DinnerTrump Scraps US Trip for Iran Talks, Leaving Ceasefire in LimboThe Hottest Phone for Kids Right Now Is a $100 LandlineGoogle
